name: User Directory
description: User directory management: lookup, manage contacts, tags, groups, privacy settings. Auto-register users on session creation and enforce group-based access control.
author: Evonic

variables.name: AUTO_REGISTER
variables.label: Auto-Register Users
variables.description: Automatically create user records when a new session is created.

variables.name: DEFAULT_GROUP_PREFIX
variables.label: Default Group Prefix
variables.description: Prefix for auto-created default groups (e.g. 'auto-' becomes 'auto-agent-id').
